rulings.Case Title: GUARDIANSHIP OF ADAM JOSEPH SIEPLE-MARGULIES et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #5, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 2/9/21. The guardian must supplement or amend his petition, as the case may be, to address why taxes for 2014-2017 were paid during this accounting period, under what authority tuition was paid from the minors' funds (was there an order?), and why the investment advisor's management fees exceeded 1% of the fair market value of the estates. Attorney fees for preparing an unnecessary ex parte application to reduce bond are not reasonable. Attorney fees exceeding 14 hours in connection with an ex parte petition to request authority to change investment firms also do not appear reasonable. The financial statements were not filed confidentially and are not originals. Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 1/29/21.

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF HAJRA N. KHAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. This matter will be heard with PTR-18-302065. Issues may include (but not limited to): The conservator is requesting authority to reopen a bank account with the conservatee's 4 children as POD payees. Should the conservator be required to file a separate petition for substituted judgment to seek this relief? Although the conservator did have such POD accounts before they were closed by the temporary successor trustee, it is unclear when the conservatee added the POD payees and whether the conservatee still desires to keep the same POD with the right of survivorship among the POD payees. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties must, whenever possible, appear remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appear by video and that they input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall. Please review the Court's 8th Amended General Order which took effect on 12/07/2020 for more information.

rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. This matter will be heard with PCN-18-302064. Issues may include (but not limited to): No Exemption Trust appears to have been set up and funded with the predeceased settlor's share of the trust assets. rulings.Case Title: **TRANSFERRED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY** CONSERVATORSHIP OF BRADLEY A. PAKULA
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #4, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 02/02/2021. The following issues remain unaddressed: 1) No proposed orders have been provided. 2) No contact information form is on file. LRSF 14.48(A)(2). 3) No current status report is on file. LRSF 14.48(I)(3). 4) The current bond must be increased before this account can be approved. LRSF 14.16(A)(2). 5) The beginning estimated market value of the disability benefits is different from the ending value reported in the prior account. 6) The date and amount of each interest payment from Wells Fargo and Ally Bank must be reported on Schedule A. 7) What is the purpose of "GILC - Insurance" reported on Schedule C? 8) Schedule C reports payment of attorney fees before the Court approved the prior account. 9) Did the Court extend the petitioner's authority to pay monthly allowances reported on Schedule C after 06/30/2018? 10) Has the petitioner's attorney prepared an order approving the prior account as directed by the Court's minute order issued on 07/10/2018?

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ERIK B. FAALAND
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 2/2/21. Original bank or brokerage statements must be filed to verify the cash on hand. Any difference between the statement(s) and the account must be reconciled. [LRSF 14.35 D.] (Funds exceeding the FDIC amount are all held at one bank, which does not appear prudent.) The I&A showed the balance in the Union Bank money market account as $197,503.52, not $177,508.54 but the I&A was never corrected. What was the source of the "additional Citibank funds" of $11,786.87? The statutory fee base may not include receipts of principal, including refunds for amounts paid during estate administration, such as taxes; however, the total receipts used in the fee calculation is less than the amount shown in the accounting. Costs incurred must be itemized: date, payee, description, and amount. Lump sums for "Filing Service Fees" or "Postage and Shipping" are insufficient. (The filing fee for this petition for final distribution was $435, not $450.) It does not appear that notice was ever given to the Norwegian consulate, pursuant to Probate Code Section 8113. Is Robert Faaland not a citizen of Norway? (There were personal property and real property taxes paid?) NB: In order for this Court to track closed matters, orders to terminate a proceeding must begin with the following language: "Order for Final Distribution," or "Order Terminating Conservatorship [or Guardianship or Trust]." [LRSF 14.36 I.6.b.] Please make a note of it. Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 1/22/21.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF GAYANE BORISOVNA BALASANYAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Issues may include (but not limited to): 1) No petition for final distribution or petition for approval of report of status of administration has been filed; and 2) No inventory and appraisal has been filed. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties must, whenever possible, appear remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appear by video and that they input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall. Please review the Court's 8th Amended General Order which took effect on 12/07/2020 for more information.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE EDWARD G. GODOSHIAN REVOCABLE LIVING TRUST TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order To Amend And Restate Trust
rulings.Rulings: Hearing appearance required. Remote appearance by video or telephone should be made whenever possible due to the recent stay at home order issued by the mayor. Please review the 8th amended general order for more information. To appear by Zoom, go to Zoom.com and click Join Meeting, and use the ID and password below. Meeting ID: 875 8017 7925 Password: 722809 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Parties appearing should check in for the hearing using their full name. ISSUES: 1) Court to determine how to proceed. On 12/01/2020 attorney Konstantine Demiris filed a 170.6 peremptory challenge against Judge Joseph M. Quinn. The substance of the petitions will not be determined at this hearing.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE MURRAY WEINBERG AND S. BETTE WEINBERG 1984 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition Of Simon And Sebastian Weinberg To Appoint Simon Weinberg As Trustee Of Murray Weinberg And S. Bette Weinberg 1984 Trust Due To Death Of Prior Trustee
rulings.Rulings: hearing. appearance required for the court to take a first look at the pleadings and discuss how to help the parties bring this matter to resolution. the judicial officer has indicated he may want to address appointing a neutral trustee for the trusts. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties must, whenever possible, appear remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appear by video and that they input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall. Please review the Court's 8th Amended General Order which took effect on 12/07/2020 for more information.
